Regions Artists Timeline All works

Hendrick Avercamp

5 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Winter Landscape with Skaters
by Hendrick Avercamp
Dutch Golden Age · c. 1608
A frozen river crowded with skaters, golfers, fallen figures, horse-drawn sleds, and one distinctly unhelpful dog. Avercamp, deaf and mute, became the specialist of the Little Ice Age tondo.
A Woman Doing Laundry in an Ice Hole (recto)
by Hendrick Avercamp
Netherlands · c. 1618 · black and red chalk, graphite, watercolor heightened with white on blue paper
Two Gentlemen (verso)
by Hendrick Avercamp
Netherlands · c. 1618 · Pen and black ink, black and red chalk, graphite and watercolor on blue paper
A Woman Doing Laundry in an Ice Hole (recto); Two Gentlemen (verso)
by Hendrick Avercamp
Netherlands · c. 1618 · black and red chalk, graphite, watercolor, pen and black ink, black and red chalk, graphite, watercolor (verso) on blue paper
Two Old Men beside a Sled Bearing the Coats of Arms of Amsterdam and Utrecht
by Hendrick Avercamp
Netherlands · 1620–1633 · Opaque and translucent watercolors
←Francesco Xanto Avelli Aymara→
